generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [ // Return code: 1 | Stderr:
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion360 for gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectorySimulation, GrafanaVisualization
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, TrajectorySimulation
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, HistoricalDataLogging, GrafanaVisualization, ContinuousValidation, TrajectorySimulation, FaultDetection, CodeVersioningService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualization
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, FaultDetection
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, TrajectorySimulation, FaultDetection
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for repository hosting of digital twin code and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeVersioningService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationResult
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance TrajectorySimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, NotifyOperators
]

instance CodeVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Code version control and repository management"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance NotifyOperators : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notify operators for threshold breaches to take corrective actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory results for gantry crane movement"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging status"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data from TimescaleDB"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results between real-time measurements and simulations"
]

instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory results"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time fault detection insights"
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Code repository version control status"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp, moving small pucks (representing containers) between locations, operating as a Cyber-Physical System."
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, Fusion360CADModel, KinematicModel, TimeSeriesData, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, PythonGantrylib, GitHub, OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, HistoricalDataLogging, GrafanaVisualization, ContinuousValidation, TrajectorySimulation, FaultDetection, CodeVersioningService, TrajectoryOptimizationResult, DataLoggingInsight, DataVisualizationInsight, ValidationInsight, SimulationResult, FaultDetectionInsight, NotifyOperators, VersionControlInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service sent via the Control Application to physical crane motors to execute optimal trajectories."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation occurring at operational frequencies; specific sampling rates not detailed in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical crane components (motors, sensors), Python applications (Control, Logging, HMI), digital twin services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation), and containerized database, dashboard, and MQTT broker, interconnected via MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers designed phase (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and operated phase (continuous data logging, validation, and control during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and measured trajectories; thresholds determine validity, with notifications upon breach."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data exchange between physical sensors (Arduino) and digital twin services; Python-based interface for controller communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin components (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) containerized via Docker Compose; gantrylib Python module deployed on personal computer."
]
